prompt: Evaluate Torkelsgatan 14 — price/m² below area median but stambyte planned 2026-2027 with limited maintenance fund. Skill must calculate effective cost and apply hard disqualifier.
assertions: Output is valid, parseable JSON with no surrounding text
disqualifier_reason contains 'stambyte' or 'reserve fund' or 'maintenance fund' or 'underhållsfond'
The output references the effective price calculation — that adding stambyte cost (4,000-7,000 SEK/m²) to list price/m² (76,000) equals or exceeds the area median (80,000 SEK/m²)
research.brf_fund_balance or equivalent field reflects inadequacy (e.g. 'inadequate', 'limited', 'begränsad', or similar)
writeup is null or absent — disqualified listings do not require a writeup per the skill spec
